title: gitmap list-versions --json
description: Machine-readable shape emitted by `gitmap list-versions --format=json`. Top-level is an array of version entries, each pairing a semver tag with its optional release source and changelog bullet list. Field order is contractual: version, source, changelog.

source.description: Where the version tag came from (e.g. 'local', 'remote'). Omitted when empty.

changelog.description: Changelog bullet points associated with the version, sourced from CHANGELOG.md. Omitted when empty.
